editorial_policy: Article bodies are manually authored in skcKenneth.github.io and are never generated or overwritten by sync.

assets.alt: Two IEEE-style line charts comparing leak-localisation accuracy across pressure noise and sensor dropout for four placement methods.
assets.caption: The proposed dropout-aware placement is compared with random, degree-centrality, and nominal greedy layouts; error bars show Wilson 95% intervals.

assets.alt: Five-stage IEEE-style methodology diagram from synthetic network construction through leak signatures, dropout-aware sensor placement, localisation, and stress evaluation.
assets.caption: The reproducible evidence pipeline separates the proposed placement step from signature generation, localisation, and Monte Carlo evaluation.

assets.alt: Side-by-side water-network diagrams comparing degree-centrality and dropout-aware pressure sensor locations.
assets.caption: Sensor layouts on the 36-node synthetic network. The proposed objective spreads measurements across diagnostically distinct regions.

assets.alt: Bar charts of dropout-aware signature separation and top-one and top-three leak-localisation accuracy under the designated stress test.
assets.caption: Ablation and stress test at 8% relative pressure noise and 40% probability of one sensor dropout.

assets.alt: Multilayer Gongbei transport network connecting pedestrian, bus, rail, and taxi nodes
assets.caption: Multilayer network used in the accessible-routing study.

assets.alt: Profit, energy, and fairness trade-off frontier for the EV dispatch experiment
assets.caption: Non-degenerate scheduling frontier from the reported EV dispatch run.

assets.alt: Space-time heat map of speed in a synthetic microscopic traffic simulation
assets.caption: Synthetic traffic-wave heat map.

assets.alt: Matrix of simulated dengue incidence across synthetic climate and allocation scenarios
assets.caption: Synthetic incidence comparison generated by the experiment matrix.

assets.alt: Modeled coastal defence cost and risk optimization frontier
assets.caption: Optimization frontier for the stylized coastal-defence teaching case.

assets.alt: Comparison of pollinator population and yield across configured management scenarios
assets.caption: Scenario comparison from the synthetic agent-based ecosystem model.
